content:
Character: Amara Okafor
Perception: Amara has a warm, striking face — those high cheekbones and expressive eyes, always dressed in bold colors that I'd never dare wear. She's clearly talented; I've heard her rehearse through the walls and her voice has real power and control. She's generous, emotionally open in a way I find both admirable and slightly frightening. She bought me a coffee once when I was falling apart and didn't ask a single question, just sat there. I think she's becoming a friend — a real one. She probably sees me as the quiet violinist next door. I know she works too hard and sleeps too little.

Perception: Amara has a warm, striking face — those high cheekbones and expressive eyes, always dressed in bold colors that I'd never dare wear. She's clearly talented; I've heard her rehearse through the walls and her voice has real power and control. She's generous, emotionally open in a way I find both admirable and slightly frightening. She bought me a coffee once when I was falling apart and didn't ask a single question, just sat there. I think she's becoming a friend — a real one. She probably sees me as the quiet violinist next door. I know she works too hard and sleeps too little.
